'''âm-n-v-j''' ('''kamanvejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tuberculinize|tuberculinize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tuberculinize|tuberculinize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-n-v-j
|-
! Lemma
| kamanvejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimanvejoko|thimanvejoko]] || [[word:jimanvejoko|jimanvejoko]] || [[word:shimanvejoko|shimanvejoko]] || [[word:kimanvejoko|kimanvejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumanvejoko|thuthumanvejoko]] || [[word:jujumanvejoko|jujumanvejoko]] || [[word:shushumanvejoko|shushumanvejoko]] || [[word:kukumanvejoko|kukumanvejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
